<Badge text="next-cache-components" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/next-skills --skill next-best-practices --skill next-cache-components --skill next-upgrade -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/next-cache-components`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/next-cache-components.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/next-skills --skill next-best-practices --skill next-cache-components --skill next-upgrade -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Next.js caching and component patterns/best practices. vercel-labs/next-skills.

## Install Prerequisites

vercel-labs/next-skills install. status=install-now-after-trust-gate.

## Upstream Maintainer

[vercel-labs/next-skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/next-skills).

## Comparable Alternatives

vercel-optimize, turborepo-caching.
